MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Mar-01-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MICHAEL MARTINOVSKY, TEL. NO. 230-5360 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS VICTOR ZVARICH AND VICTORY CONSTRUCTION, INC.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT is Granted, for good cause shown. The motion is timely. The court grants discretionary relief from default based on Mr. Zvarich's mistake. Defendant must respond to the Complaint within 10 days of entry of this order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM
